parsed_review.summary: CP00-444 is a clean, internally-consistent descriptor-only settlement-core pack covering the RP14.P06.M05 Permission And Audit Binding tail (4 rows) and the RP14.P06.M06 Synthetic Fixture Set head (6 rows), 10 RP14 units total over range RP14.P06.M05.S19-RP14.P06.M06.S06, with distribution test:4/security_audit:1/implementation:5. Source inspection via Read/Grep/Glob confirms: (1) all 7 required public exports are defined (createSettlementCoreCp444P06PermissionFixtureSliceCaseSet/Descriptor in service.js; validateSettlementCoreCp444Coverage, validateSettlementCoreCp444P06PermissionFixtureSliceDescriptor, createSettlementCoreCp444HermesEvidencePacket/ClaudeReviewPacket/CloseoutHandoff in validators.js) and re-exported through index.js; (2) coverage/section/deliverable distributions match the plan binding, manifest, and contract cp444_requirements; (3) the contract-embedded p06_permission_fixture_slice_descriptor deep-equals the source descriptor and contains only structural metadata with every row marked descriptor_only:true, runtime_execution:false, raw_payload_included:false, customer_safe_errors_only:true; (4) tests (3 CP444 blocks plus validator-script assertions) cover coverage, descriptor-only rows, evidence packets, handoff, and authority boundaries; (5) command-evidence records all required validation/test/build commands exiting 0. No-write/no-real-data boundaries are fully attested (no settlement/origination/allocation/working-credit runtime, no audit write, no Hermes runtime receipt, no real fixture data, no permission/audit/blocked-claim/fixture/raw-payload leakage). The authority boundary holds: production_ready:false and runtime_ready:false with status implemented_pending_review, claude_is_final_approval:false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust:false, and human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true. Hermes patterns appear only as deterministic evidence-packet/receipt labels, not product runtime. Review-evidence hardening checks pass: readiness auth-preflight succeeded (exit 0, 1446-byte valid JSON, non-zero stdout), tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, no forbidden tools. The three post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are not yet present, which is the correct pre-review state since this review produces the first and the others follow in the hardening sequence. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings; the descriptor-verification production_ready_flag is supported by implementation, tests, local/Hermes validation evidence, and the no-write/no-real-data and authority boundaries.
